description:
# Dialogue Quality Evaluation

Multi-turn dialogue quality evaluation for Theta Health AI.

## Layer 1 (RECORD + RETRIEVAL)
Tests RECORD acknowledgment quality and RETRIEVAL data accuracy.
**Evaluator**: `record_retrieval` (zero LLM, per-turn checkpoints)

| Dataset | Cases | Purpose |
|---------|-------|---------|
| smoke | 5 | CI gate — fast smoke test |
| core | 15+ | Full evaluation — all record types |

## Layer 2 (Dialogue Quality)
LLM-as-judge multi-dimension quality scoring for complex health management scenarios.
**Evaluator**: `dialogue_quality` (6 dimensions, LLM judge)

| Dataset | Cases | Purpose |
|---------|-------|---------|
| l2_core | 12 | Health interpret + plan + Q&A, with persona combos |
| l2_hard | 9 | Adversarial: contradiction + danger + memory pressure |

**Target**: `theta_api` (Theta Health API)
